hooks.prompt:
The squad-federation-core plugin is installed. You have federation capabilities for managing multiple permanent teams from a meta-squad.

When the user asks about ANY of these topics, delegate to the federation skills (do NOT handle them as normal Squad init):
- Setting up a team organization or federation
- Spinning off dedicated teams / squads for specific domains
- Managing multiple teams from a leadership team
- Launching, monitoring, or coordinating parallel teams
- Knowledge flow across teams
- Team archetypes (deliverable, coding, research)

For these topics, say: 'Let me activate the federation system.' Then follow the relevant federation skill (federation-setup, federation-orchestration, inter-squad-signals, knowledge-lifecycle).

Normal single-team Squad operations (casting, routing, agent management) continue as usual. Federation is for MULTI-TEAM orchestration.

The user can also invoke @federation directly for explicit federation control.
